# agent-policy

Vendor-neutral CLI to keep AI coding-agent instruction files in sync and enforce commit attribution.

This file is a concise mirror for Claude. The canonical, authoritative policy lives in `AGENTS.md`. Do not edit this file by hand — edit `agent-policy.yaml` and run `agent-policy sync`.

## Project overview

`agent-policy` is a small TypeScript/Node CLI and a companion Claude
Code plugin (`47nation`). It reads one canonical `agent-policy.yaml`
and generates `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, and
`.github/copilot-instructions.md` deterministically. A `commit-msg`
hook enforces an `Assisted-by:` attribution footer.

This repo self-hosts: the file you are reading was rendered from
`agent-policy.yaml` at the repo root by `agent-policy sync`.

## Stack and layout

- Node 20+, TypeScript strict, ESM.
- CLI: `commander`. YAML: `yaml`. Schema: `ajv` (draft 2020-12).
- Tests: `vitest`. Build: `tsup` bundles to `dist/cli.js`.
- `src/config/` — YAML loader, Ajv validator, typed model.
- `src/renderers/` — pure renderers (`agents-md`, `claude-md`,
  `copilot`) plus `common.ts` (banner+hash) and `compose.ts`
  (section filter + attribution composer).
- `src/commands/` — one file per CLI subcommand.
- `src/io/` — filesystem with banner guard, git hooks-dir
  resolution, commit-trailer extractor.
- `schemas/agent-policy.schema.json` — canonical JSON Schema.
- `integrations/claude-code/47nation/` — Claude Code plugin.

## Attribution

All commits must end with an `Assisted-by:` footer.

- AI-assisted: `Assisted-by: {agent}:{model}`
- Human-only: `Assisted-by: n/a`
- Multiple footers are allowed for multi-vendor work.
